{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/17133261?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/cla7aye15I4nd", "id": 17133261, "login": "cla7aye15I4nd", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE3MTMzMjYx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/cla7aye15I4nd", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-125", "name": "Out-of-bounds Read"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}], "description": "### Summary

`Nokogiri::XML::NodeSet#[]` (and its alias `#slice`) checked the requested index against the node set's bounds using a 32-bit-truncated copy of the index. A large negative index could pass the check and then be used at full width, reading outside the node set's storage. On CRuby this is an out-of-bounds read that typically crashes the process; on JRuby it is not memory-unsafe but returns an incorrect node.

Nokogiri 1.19.4 performs the bounds check against the full-width index.

### Severity

The Nokogiri maintainers have evaluated this as medium severity.

Exploitation requires an application to pass an attacker-controlled integer to `NodeSet#[]`. The primary impact is a controlled crash (denial of service), with potential for memory disclosure on CRuby.

On JRuby, Nokogiri is not affected by this vulnerability.

### Mitigation

Upgrade to Nokogiri 1.19.4 or later.

As a workaround, applications that index a `NodeSet` with externally-supplied integers can validate the index against `node_set.length` before use, or avoid passing untrusted values as an index.

### Credit

This issue was responsibly reported by Zheng Yu from depthfirst.com.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T16:36:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T16:36:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri/security/advisories/GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sparklemotion/nokogiri/security-advisories/GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sparklemotion/nokogiri", "summary": "Nokogiri: Possible Out-of-Bounds Read in `Nokogiri::XML::NodeSet#[]`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T16:36:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5prr-v3j2-97mh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.19.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "nokogiri"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.19.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Nokogiri: Possible Out-of-Bounds Read in `Nokogiri::XML::NodeSet#[]`
